title: $readmemh: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to same variable

features.name: readmemh with associative array and non-blocking assignments
features.description: Code should include $readmemh reading into an associative array that also receives non-blocking assignments in an always block

features.name: blocked and non-blocking assignments to associative array
features.description: Code should include a variable that receives both blocking (via $readmemh) and non-blocking assignments in separate procedural blocks
